theme_and_archetype.description: High-end, premium 'Apple-standard' UI with a deep black background and cyan/teal accents. Heavily uses crystal glassmorphism, crisp typography, and fluid micro-interactions.

headings.strategy: Premium, geometric scaling. Tracking tight on large sizes.

body.strategy: Apple standard legibility. High contrast, clean.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Bento Grids for Dashboard.

grid_modes.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Wide, asymmetrical.
grid_modes.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense, precise.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-medium hover:bg-[#80F2FF] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all backdrop-blur-md

motion.scrolling: MANDATORY: Use lenis library for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion.page_transitions: Framer Motion: opacity and subtle y-axis translation on enter.
motion.micro_interactions: Scale transform (scale: 0.98) on button click. Hover effects on all cards.

components.navigation: Sticky crystal glass header (`bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10`). Logo left, links center, CTA right. No hamburger on desktop.
components.hero: Holographic cards floating in 3D (Framer motion). Gradient text for key value prop. Dark overlay over subtle ambient background video/image.
components.feature_cards: Bento box layout (Tetris Grid). Alternating spans. Hover effects reveal teal borders.
components.stats_section: Massive typography (text-6xl+). Monospace numbers. Animated counter.
components.auth: Glass panel over abstract cyan blurred orbs. Simple, high-conversion.
components.dashboard_widgets: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders. Dense layout, no unnecessary padding. High contrast table rows.

images.description: Premium Pokemon cards for holographic tilt effects in hero
Vintage collectible cards for razz and trading preview

testing: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
instructions_to_main_agent: Replace existing Tailwind Orange with Cyan/Teal (#00E5FF).
Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the new colors and 'Outfit' font.
Refactor Landing Page to use Bento grids, Crystal Glassmorphism, and large typography.
Ensure all components use Shadcn UI but heavily customized to match the Apple-standard dark glass theme.
Ensure the hero image uses the provided Pexels links and has a `bg-black/50` overlay to preserve readability.
